---
title: Plugin Permissions
description: Permissions available to Recall plugins.
---

Plugins declare the capabilities they need in the `recall.permissions` array of
their manifest. Every plugin must declare at least one permission. Request only
the permissions required for the plugin to work.

```json
{
  "recall": {
    "permissions": ["ui.theme.static.write"]
  }
}
```

See the
[default theme plugin](https://github.com/jrTilak/recall-core/tree/master/plugins/default-theme)
for a complete example.

The available permissions are defined by
[`PluginPermissionSchema`](https://github.com/jrTilak/recall-core/blob/master/packages/plugin-schema/src/schema/plugin-permissions.ts).

## Available permissions

### `ui.theme.static.write`

Allows a plugin to provide static theme configuration that changes Recall's
colors and other supported UI theme variables.

Use this permission for theme plugins whose appearance is defined through a
theme JSON file. Theme-only plugins do not need additional permissions.

### `options.sorting-methods.modify`

Allows a plugin to register, update, or remove sorting method definitions
across Recall apps.

Use this permission for plugins that provide custom sorting implementations.
See the
[default sorting methods plugin](https://github.com/jrTilak/recall-core/tree/master/plugins/default-sorting-methods)
for an example.
